title: Remove redundant cost phrases in ContactPage

requirements.summary: Remove the phrase '– ganz ohne Kosten' from the 'Wichtig zu wissen' section in ContactPage.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: The string '– ganz ohne Kosten' no longer appears anywhere in the 'Wichtig zu wissen' section of ContactPage.tsx.
The rest of the sentence reads naturally without the removed phrase.
No other text in the section is altered.

file_operations.description: In the 'Wichtig zu wissen' section, locate and remove all occurrences of the phrase '– ganz ohne Kosten' (including the em dash and surrounding spaces). Ensure the surrounding sentence remains grammatically correct and natural after the removal.

requirements.summary: Remove redundant '– kostenlos' from the Kennenlerngespräch description in the 'Termin buchen' section
acceptanceCriteria: The parenthetical '– kostenlos' is removed from the Kennenlerngespräch description in the 'Termin buchen' section.
The sentence now reads '(30 Minuten)' without any cost qualifier inside the parentheses.
No other text in the 'Termin buchen' section is altered.

file_operations.description: In the 'Termin buchen' section, change the text 'Buchen Sie direkt online entweder das kostenlose Kennenlerngespräch (30 Minuten – kostenlos)' to 'Buchen Sie direkt online entweder das kostenlose Kennenlerngespräch (30 Minuten)' by removing '– kostenlos' from inside the parentheses.
